'''Deredith Arden''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] and the [[Captain/Legends|captain]] of the colony ship that settled on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] in [[Wild Space/Legends|Wild Space]] around [[150 BBY/Legends|150 BBY]].

==Biography==
Arden founded both [[Bakura/Legends|Bakura]] and its capital city, [[Salis D'aar/Legends|Salis D'aar]], and served as [[Prime Minister (Bakura)|Prime Minister]] for eight years. The planet [[Arden]] was named after him.

After Arden's [[Death/Legends|death]], and faced with diminishing returns, the [[Bakur Mining Corporation]] faced an uncertain future; this may have been the factor that led to the power shift from the Corporation to the [[Bakuran Senate]].

All titular heads-of-government of Bakura, until at last the end of [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] control in [[4 ABY/Legends|4 ABY]], were descended from Arden.

==Appearances==
*''[[The Truce at Bakura]]'' {{1stm}}
